mapper.select: SELECT * FROM asset WHERE asset_id = #{assetId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM asset WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY asset_type, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset(asset_id, user_id, asset_type, name, bank_name, card_last_four, balance, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{assetId}, #{userId}, #{assetType}, #{name}, #{bankName}, #{cardLastFour}, #{balance}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE asset
name = #{name},
bank_name = #{bankName},
card_last_four = #{cardLastFour},
balance = #{balance},
remark = #{remark},
update_time = NOW(),
WHERE asset_id = #{assetId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM asset_record WHERE asset_id = #{assetId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_record(record_id, asset_id, user_id, operation_type, before_balance, after_balance, change_amount, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{recordId}, #{assetId}, #{userId}, #{operationType}, #{beforeBalance}, #{afterBalance}, #{changeAmount}, #{remark}, NOW())
